# Starfinder Character Sheet Fixtures

This directory contains fixture files for the Starfinder character sheet importer.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `generate_navasi.py` | Script to (re)generate the `navasi_starfinder.pdf` synthetic fixture |
| `navasi_starfinder.pdf` | Committed synthetic fixture PDF for CI; generated by `generate_navasi.py` |

## Test Character: Navasi

**Navasi** is the Paizo iconic Envoy, used here as a synthetic fixture character.
The PDF is built programmatically using pypdf widget annotations so the test
suite can run in CI without distributing the real Paizo fillable character sheet.

### Field Schema

Starfinder shares the six ability scores (STR/DEX/CON/INT/WIS/CHA) with D&D 5e
and Pathfinder, but introduces several fields with no 5e equivalent.  These are
stored under system-namespaced keys in `character.sheet` to avoid overloading
shared keys such as `hp`:

| Schema key | Starfinder concept | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `hp` | Hit Points | Shared schema key (`max`/`current`) |
| `starfinder_stamina` | Stamina Points | No 5e equivalent (`max`/`current`) |
| `starfinder_resolve` | Resolve Points | No 5e equivalent (`max`/`current`) |
| `starfinder_kac` | Kinetic Armor Class | No 5e equivalent (integer) |
| `starfinder_eac` | Energy Armor Class | No 5e equivalent (integer) |
| `starfinder_theme` | Character Theme | Closest to Background but distinct |
| `starfinder_homeworld` | Homeworld | No 5e equivalent |
| `race` | Race / Species | Maps to shared `race` key |
| `saves` | Fort / Ref / Will | Integer totals (no proficiency ranks) |
| `skills` | Skill list | `{name: {ranks, total}}` |
| `feats` | Feats | Flat list |
| `class_features` | Class features | List |
| `equipment` | Gear / weapons | List |
| `bulk` | Bulk encumbrance | `{current, limit}` |
| `spell_slots` | Spell slots (casters) | `{level: max}` |

## Regenerating the Fixture

```bash
python server/tests/fixtures/starfinder/generate_navasi.py
```

## Licensing Note

The synthetic PDF is generated programmatically from field names and values
defined in this repository.  It does **not** include or reproduce any artwork,
layout, or rules text from the official Paizo Starfinder fillable PDF.

The Starfinder Roleplaying Game is published by Paizo Inc.  The field names
used here are based on the publicly available Starfinder System Reference
Document (SFRD) under the Open Game License v1.0a.

Real Paizo fillable PDFs must **not** be committed to this repository.
